<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3800342-klasky_csupo_logo.svg.png","path":"239\/2391650\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"square_tiny,square_medium,square_small,scale_super,scale_medium,scale_small,square_mini,square_avatar,screen_medium,screen_kubrick,scale_large,scale_avatar","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Klasky Csupo is an animated company, best known for Rugrats, Rocket Power, As Told by Ginger and All Grown Up.

{{Company |Guid=3010-26435 |Name=Konspiracy Games |Image=Konspiracy-logo800-t.png |FoundedDate=2020-01 |Country=Germany |Website=https://konspiracy.de/ |Developed=Games/Blossom And Decay |Published=Games/Blossom And Decay |Developed_games=Games/Blossom_And_Decay |Published_games=Games/Blossom_And_Decay }} <div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> Konspiracy Games is a small indie dev studio based in Germany working on its first title, Blossom & Decay, a browser-based Emergent Narrative Sandbox MMO ARPG.
Blossom & Decay's development started in 2015. It was first published as a combat demo in 2016 and then as a closed sandbox demo in 2018. Development is ongoing and close alpha testing is planned to begin in 2026.

revision.comment: Created page with "{{Company |Guid=30368031-f48a-4dde-9526-0f9c8ebf0a20 |Name=Laniatus LLC |Deck=Developer, publisher and cloud game engine provider of its free-to-play fictional cloud MMO games. |Abbreviation=Laniatus |FoundedDate=2023-01-08 |Address=1500 N GRANT ST, STE N 80203 |City=Denver |Country=Colorado |State=US |Phone=+1 303 219 0375 |Website=https://laniatus.com }} Developer, publisher and cloud game engine provider of its free-to-play fictional cloud MMO games."
revision.text: {{Company |Guid=30368031-f48a-4dde-9526-0f9c8ebf0a20 |Name=Laniatus LLC |Deck=Developer, publisher and cloud game engine provider of its free-to-play fictional cloud MMO games. |Abbreviation=Laniatus |FoundedDate=2023-01-08 |Address=1500 N GRANT ST, STE N 80203 |City=Denver |Country=Colorado |State=US |Phone=+1 303 219 0375 |Website=https://laniatus.com }} Developer, publisher and cloud game engine provider of its free-to-play fictional cloud MMO games.
